What We Do

One partner for your entire web presence.

From the first line of code to ongoing care, we own the whole thing so you never have to think about it.

01

Custom Websites

Designed and built from scratch around your business — fast, modern, and made to convert visitors into customers.

02

Google Business Profile

We set up and optimize your Google Business Profile so you show up on Maps and Search when local customers go looking.

03

Hosting & Care

We host, secure, and maintain your site so it stays online, loads fast, and never becomes your problem to manage.

04

Ongoing Updates

New photo, new service, a change to make? Send a message and it is handled — same day, no logins, no hassle.

Why North Point

Clear communication, handled professionally.

  • We answer the phone

    Real service from a real person who knows your site. No tickets, no runaround, no outsourced support.

  • Made to last

    We take the time to build it right the first time — clean, durable sites that hold up for years, not months.

  • Your time, protected

    You should be focused on your business, not fighting with a website. That is the entire point of working with us.

  • Local and easy to reach

    Canadian owned and operated. Clear communication with someone who knows your market — no call centres, no runaround.

How We Work

A clear path from idea to live.

i

Talk

We learn your business, your customers, and what the site actually needs to do.

ii

Build

We design and develop your custom site, keeping you in the loop the whole way.

iii

Launch

We handle hosting, domain, and going live — set up properly so it just works.

iv

Maintain

We keep it running and update it whenever you need, so it stays an asset.
